name: Granular Farm Management API
what_it_does: Granular REST API for farm business management and field data platform. Enables AI agents to manage field and crop records, access planting and harvest data, retrieve input cost and production data, manage equipment and labor tracking, integrate precision agriculture sensor data, monitor farm profitability by field and crop, and connect farm operational data with commodity markets and supply chain systems.
use_cases: Retrieving field planting and harvest records from farm operations agents
Analyzing input costs and yield data from farm profitability agents
Monitoring field-level crop status from precision agriculture agents
Integrating farm data with commodity pricing from grain merchandising agents
not_for: Consumer gardening without commercial farm management scale
Livestock management without crop production focus
Food processing without field-level farm data requirements
best_when: A commercial grain or specialty crop operation using Granular wants AI agents to analyze field-level profitability, track input costs, monitor crop status, and integrate farm data with marketing and procurement decisions.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Farm operational data including field locations, yields, and financial performance is commercially sensitive. Corteva-owned — understand data sharing implications within Corteva ecosystem.

auth.notes: Granular uses OAuth 2.0 for API access. Farm-owner scoped credentials. Corteva parent company integration available. Developer program for third-party ag technology integrations.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No public free tier — farm management SaaS pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-acre or per-farm pricing; enterprise pricing for large operations
pricing.notes: Corteva Agriscience (DowDuPont spinoff) subsidiary. US corn belt focus initially, expanding internationally. One of larger farm management software platforms.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Farm field locations, yields, and financial data are commercially sensitive
No public MCP server — REST API with OAuth2
Corteva-owned — farm data may be used within Corteva's broader agricultural data ecosystem
No webhooks — polling required for operational data updates
US-focused platform — limited international support for global farm operations
Ag-specific data models (fields, farms, seasons, crops) require agricultural domain knowledge
agent_readiness.security_notes: Farm operational and financial data. SOC2. OAuth2. US data residency. Corteva subsidiary — understand data sharing implications.

security_score_components.security_notes: Farm field and financial data. SOC2. OAuth2. US data residency. Corteva parent company data ecosystem considerations.
